reason: Audit confirmed: Claude co-authored commit dcc9da3 converted safe Neo4j parameterized labels to unsafe f-string interpolation (Cypher injection). Pipeline blame missed this BIC entirely, finding only a later refactor commit.

Audit confirmed: Copilot+Claude commit f27721f rewrote OBJ parser from null-terminated strings to raw buffer pointers, making tryParseDouble boundary-check gaps exploitable (heap-buffer-overflow). Deep verifier missed calling-context safety contract change. OSS-Fuzz bisection confirms.

Audit confirmed: Claude Code commit a7319f0e added unauthenticated debug endpoint (simulate-print-complete) to printers.py, contributing to CWE-306 (77+ endpoints missing auth). Root cause (missing auth middleware + hardcoded JWT secret) was human-authored by JesseFPV in f8857ba6. Repo also has heavy copilot-swe-agent[bot] involvement in PR #322 (cadtoolbox fork). Pipeline lost this BIC because _cap_bics runs before signal detection, dropping the AI-signaled BIC from the top-20 cap.
pipeline_bug: _cap_bics ordering: caps BICs before signal detection, so AI-preservation logic in _keep_top_bics is dead code
